causalAutopsy.notes: The canonical single-message deferral recognizer already existed; this increment adds the requested bounded aggregate pattern signal without duplicating recognition or storage.

guardEvidence.howCaught: Strict dark no-read and dry-run no-emission bounds prevent autonomous action in increment 1; the stable Attention dedupe key is tested across repeated counts, and future boot wiring must re-prove real-funnel idempotency.
